title: ふたりの進む、その先"へ"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap and I happen to overhear a
conversation as we arrive at the training course.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hey! Did you hear what Tama did?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
You mean when she came from the back and
whizzed past fifteen people all at once? Yeah, I
heard!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that awesome? Especially when you consider
how tiny she is!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Right? I used to think she was just cute, but she's
actually pretty cool!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I feel like she looked more serious than usual
though. It kinda freaked me out...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm going for a run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap starts to run, despite barely having
done her warm-ups. It seems like her head is
somewhere else though, seeing as she dashes off
in the wrong direction.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I call out to her, but she doesn't come back.
Panicked, I set off in pursuit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Flustered, I search all over for her. I eventually
track her down, but it appears someone else has
beaten me to it.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I see... So that's why things have soured between
you and Tamtam.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You had me worried, just standin' there in front of
that tree stump like that...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: You are such a dummy!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Urgh... I just don't know what to do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's asking Inari One and Super
Creek for some advice, so I decide to stand back
and watch from afar.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You and Tamtam are really good friends. I
understand why you're confused.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But you guys can't carry on like this! If she's truly
your friend, ya need to spill your guts and talk
things through!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: S-spill my guts?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Just to be clear, that's just an expression! What I
really mean is ya have to be open and honest
about how you feel!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...I know that. I'm just not confident I'd be able to
get my point across properly.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And that's okay. You don't need to say anything
special.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You just need to be upfront about how it made
you feel being called her rival.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Be honest with Tamtam about your true feelings.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
My true feelings? I think I remember Tama telling
me something like that before.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...All right! I'm gonna go speak with her!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: You've got this! She's by the river!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Good luck, Oguri! ♪ I want you to be able to
bring your A game the next time I run against you!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You got it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hey, Oguri! The river's the other way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm going to have to chase after her again!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: All right, time for some joggin'!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Wait, Tama!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: O-Oguri?! And...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Geez, Your trainer's huffin' and puffin' like a
hound dog.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Oguri Cap has no sense of direction
whatsoever, I ended up having to guide her the
whole way here. Thankfully, though, we were able
to track Tamamo Cross down.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Listen, Tama. I'm... I'm...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm glad you're my friend!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm glad that you were the first person who came and spoke to me in the beginning. And I'm really glad that we get to share a room!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: And... I'm glad you called me your rival!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: It's just... I couldn't wrap my head around how I could be friends with someone and compete against them at the same time. And because of that, I hurt you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But I'm okay now. I think I've figured it out.
You're my friend, Tama.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: And you're my rival!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Up till now, I never could've even imagined
having someone as special as you in my life...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
What's that commotion over there? Is someone...
declaring their love?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: No way! In a place like this? Talk about brave!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right, Oguri! I got ya. Chill out for a sec, will
ya?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
No, no more waiting! I want to tell you exactly
how I feel!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Oh, it is a confession! First time I've seen one with my own eyes!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama! The truth is, I...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: WAIT! Seriously! Put a sock in it for a sec! Zip it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...I get how ya feel. I mean, ya haven't really left
me with much choice!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Does that mean you're not mad at me
anymore?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Naw, I'm still mad. You still gotta prove to me
that ya mean what you're sayin'!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya know why I stayed here instead of aimin' for
the Dream Trophy and rakin' in the big bucks?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's 'cause I don't wanna move up until I prove to
everyone that I'm the strongest in our generation!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I asked ya this before, didn't I? How are you gonna show everyone how great you are?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The heck? Cat got your tongue? Bein' a Goody
Two-shoes isn't gonna get ya the credit that ya
deserve!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...I'm gonna work my way up by winning. There's
no other way to do it.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's right. There's only one thing I want from
ya—a race!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The only way I'll know whether you're serious or
not is when we go head-to-head.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Now, listen up. I'm runnin' in the Tenno Sho in both spring and autumn!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: The Tenno Sho?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Held every spring and autumn, the Tenno Sho is a
legendary race with a long history and is one of
the most important G1 races out there.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's up to you to decide what ya wanna do. Talk it
over with yer trainer.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Still pantin', huh?! How long were ya runnin' for?
Poor thing.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Anyway, ya get my drift. I'll be waitin' for ya!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: The Tenno Sho, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a quiet fire burning in Oguri Cap's eyes as
she watches Tamamo Cross walk away.
